lines.title: Is East Blue really the weakest sea? Let's see what the data says.

lines.east-blue-clean: East Blue, without Luffy and Roger. The numbers are brutal.
lines.east-blue: But add Luffy and Roger back, and East Blue completely transforms.
lines.west: West Blue. Home to a few real heavyweights.
lines.north: North Blue, where dark legends grow.
lines.south: South Blue. Plenty of pirates, plenty of bounty.
lines.grand-line: The Grand Line. The real game begins here.
lines.new-world: And the New World. The strongest pirates of all.
lines.recap: Here's the full ranking, strongest sea first.
lines.final: So… is East Blue really the weakest? It depends who you count.
